activation_mode.mechanism: OpenCode rule files load unconditionally as context; no conditional activation syntax documented

auto_memory.mechanism: No runtime command documented for persisting notes into rule files

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: OpenCode reads both AGENTS.md (cross-provider convention) and CLAUDE.md (historical Claude Code convention) from project root

file_imports.mechanism: No documented import directive for rule files

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: Project-root AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md combined with global context files at ~/.config/opencode/

providerExtensions.name: AGENTS.md cross-provider convention
providerExtensions.summary: Plain markdown rule file at project root, shared with other agent tools (no frontmatter, context-injected).

providerExtensions.name: CLAUDE.md compatibility
providerExtensions.summary: OpenCode also reads CLAUDE.md at project root for compatibility with Claude Code projects.
